headline: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Stock Looks Overvalued Despite Upcoming Q2 Earnings
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services has delivered a strong 65.1% return over the past year, yet its valuation checks and current pricing suggest the stock is far from a clear bargain. Over the last 12 months, West Pharmaceutical Services shares are up 65.1%. This puts extra focus on whether recent gains already reflect investors' expectations. Anticipation of ongoing earnings growth and portfolio changes such as the sale of certain SmartDose manufacturing rights can support a higher valuation. Any...
